# Reinforcement Learning Based Hospital Scheduling System

## Overview
This project implements a Reinforcement Learning based hospital scheduling system to optimize patient scheduling, reduce waiting time, and improve hospital resource utilization.

## Project Pipeline
The project was developed in multiple phases:
1. Environment setup
2. Dataset generation
3. Baseline scheduling
4. Tabular Q-Learning
5. Scaling experiments
6. Linear Q-Learning
7. Deep Q Network (DQN)
8. Double DQN (DDQN)
9. Generalization experiments
10. Fairness analysis
11. Final training and evaluation

## Features
- Custom hospital simulation environment
- Q-Learning, DQN and DDQN agents
- Fairness analysis
- Reward tracking
- Explainable AI decision assistant
- Streamlit dashboard
- Synthetic dataset generation

## Technologies Used
Python, Reinforcement Learning, PyTorch, Streamlit, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib

## How to Run
pip install -r requirements.txt  
Open notebooks from 00_phase0_setup to 11_train_agent in order.
